arts.ttl: Leeds United team news vs Millwall as Daniel Farke hands youngster surprise full debut
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has handed Sam Chambers his full Leeds United debut for this afternoon's FA Cup fourth round tie against Millwall in one of 10 team changes. Starting XI: Darlow; Schmidt, Struijk, Ampadu, Byram; Rothwell, Guilavogui; Ramazani, Chambers, Gnonto; Joseph.

arts.ttl: Player says he’s living Leeds United dream – Not defensive like Sheffield United and Burnley
arts.sum: Leeds United, Burnley and Sheffield United are in contention for direct promotion to the Premier League. Daniel Farke’s side are leading the Championship table with 66 points, five points ahead of Burnley and Sheffield United who are in second and third spot respectively. The Blades can reduce the gap with Leeds to two points if The post Player says he’s living Leeds United dream – Not defensive like Sheffield United and Burnley appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 49ers Enterprises handed Leeds United transfer window justification as striker debate rumbles on
arts.sum: Leeds United return to Elland Road on Saturday for the first time since the 7-0 win over Cardiff City that started this month in style. Bayern Munich are the only club from Europe's top five leagues that can match Leeds, thanks to a 4-3 win to start this month.

arts.ttl: Leeds United vs Millwall kick-off time explained as FA Cup fourth round tie decision made
arts.sum: Leeds United host Millwall at Elland Road on Saturday for the first of two times in the next five-and-a-half weeks when they meet this weekend in the fourth round of the FA Cup . This weekend's is more in line with Championship allocations, with Leeds having 2,022 tickets for the league meeting in November.

arts.ttl: Ramazani opportunity, final chance for Leeds trio and FA Cup impact vs Millwall
arts.sum: Leeds United will be the favourites to keep their unbeaten run going and defeat Millwall to progress through to the fifth round of the FA Cup on Saturday. Even if Leeds progress, tougher opposition may await in the next round and the manager has outlined how he doesn’t “gift” minutes away just because it is a cup competition.

arts.ttl: UCL magician: Leeds United must lay groundwork for this marquee signing in 2025
arts.sum: Leeds United were linked with a move to sign Martin Baturina from Dinamo Zagreb this season, and their interest ought to remain heading towards this summer. Leeds and the 49ers are planning to be a Premier League club next season, sitting clear in the automatic promotion places deservedly as things stand.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Millwall on TV? How to watch, live stream details, FA Cup kick-off time
arts.sum: Unfortunately, Leeds vs Millwall has not been selected for live television coverage by ITV and the BBC as part of their FA Cup coverage this weekend in the UK. Despite the clash between Leeds and Millwall not being broadcast in the UK, Leeds Live will be in attendance to provide live match updates and post-match analysis from the FA Cup fourth-round tie.

arts.ttl: Millwall club record signing Neghli set for debut as boss Neil throws down challenge to his squad
arts.sum: I don’t think Ra’ees, or anybody, would have thought he would be playing first-team football like he has done – but that’s based around how he’s trained and played. “It’s about bringing some younger players in and trying to create assets.

arts.ttl: Behind-the-scenes Cameron Archer reaction revealed after Leeds United’s failed January bid
arts.sum: Leeds failed to sign Cameron Archer on loan after Southampton rejected bid Cameron Archer of Southampton was the man Leeds turned to with a formal approach, submitting a loan offer that the Saints ended up rejecting.

arts.ttl: Leeds United have new Championship promotion race advantage over Sheffield United and Sunderland
arts.sum: The pressure is on Sheffield United and Sunderland in the Championship promotion race this weekend after Leeds United moved five points clear at the top of the table in midweek. However, the pressure will be on in the Steel City, especially if the Black Cats beat Watford in the early kick-off to move level on points with them and the Clarets.
